title: vangueria mollis
intro: Vangueria mollis, also known as the Sweet Thorn or Velvet Ball, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vangueria mollis include treating fever, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. Vangueria mollis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
